artifact.title: Generate AI status report

story.goal: Compile tasks, time logs, and material usage into a professional plain-language status report using the platform LLM proxy so the PM can review and later share it with the client.
steps: The PM opens the project detail page and clicks 'Generate Status Report', specifying the reporting period start and end dates.
The backend reads WorkTask, TimeLog, and MaterialUsage records for the project within the specified period.
The platform LLM proxy compiles the data into a plain-language status report covering progress, costs, and delay risks.
A new StatusReport record is created with status 'generated', the AI-produced content, and the reporting period dates.
story.outcome: A StatusReport record exists with status 'generated' and AI-generated content ready for PM review before sharing with the client.

inputs.description: Project identifier from the project detail page route parameter.
Start date of the reporting period the PM wants the report to cover.
End date of the reporting period the PM wants the report to cover.
System-generated UUID for the new status report record.
AI-generated plain-language report content produced by the LLM proxy from compiled task, time log, and material data.
Timestamp when the LLM proxy generates the report content.
Identifier of the LLM model returned by the platform proxy after generation.
Record creation timestamp set by the backend.
Record last-update timestamp set by the backend.

contextResolution.description: Resolved from the project detail page route parameter identifying the active project.
The backend generates a new UUID for the status report record at creation time.

The backend reads WorkTask, TimeLog, and MaterialUsage records for the project within the reporting period, sends the compiled data to the platform LLM proxy, and stores the returned plain-language report text as content.
The backend records the current timestamp at the moment the LLM proxy returns the generated content.
The platform LLM proxy response includes the model identifier used, which the backend stores on the record.
The backend sets the creation timestamp to the current time when persisting the new record.
The backend sets the last-update timestamp to the current time when persisting the new record.

acceptanceAssertions: After generation, a StatusReport record exists with status 'generated' and is linked to the correct project via projectId.
The report content is compiled from WorkTask, TimeLog, and MaterialUsage data within the specified reporting period — not manually written by the PM.
The LLM call goes through the platform LLM proxy and llmModelUsed records the model identifier used.
The StatusReport content covers the period from reportPeriodStart to reportPeriodEnd as specified by the PM.
The generated report includes plain-language coverage of project progress, costs, and delay risks ready for PM review before sharing.
